build.name: Verify Rust workspace
build.run: cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo clippy --workspace --tests -- -D warnings; cargo test --workspace

package.name: Package AIoT server binaries

sbom.name: Write AIoT package SBOM evidence

validate.name: Validate topology and OpenAPI contracts
validate.run: pnpm test:topology-validate; pnpm test:topology-baggage; pnpm api:check; pnpm sdk:check
